## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / enhancement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal change
- [ ] Catalogue data refresh (automated or manual)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (`pytest` passes locally on at least one OS)
- [ ] `ruff check src tests` and `ruff format --check src tests` pass
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] No secrets, credentials or personal data included
- [ ] If this changes tool signatures: README and docstrings updated
